title: Generative AI Feasibility & Business Case
short_desc: A data-driven business assessment report exploring the strategic integration, financial runway, and operational scenarios of Generative AI within a global design department.
blueprint_desc: Evaluated the practical feasibility of adopting Generative AI pipelines for a corporate graphic design division. Built and analyzed multi-tier implementation scenarios mapping out creative efficiency gains against technical overhead. Delivered definitive, data-driven recommendations that outlined the legal risk frameworks, practical organizational hurdles, and bottom-line financial implications of automated tooling workflows.
